prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈希土冲突的起因
prophecies.a: 「事件将因为一个与石油和海底资源有关的争端而开始。当土耳其人对希腊提出领土要求时，其他国家会说：既然你们要在那里夺取领土，我们也要拿走君士坦丁堡。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on the cause of Greek-Turkish conflict
prophecies.a_en: "Events will begin because of a dispute related to oil and undersea resources. When the Turks make territorial claims against Greece, other nations will say: since you want to seize land there, we will take Constantinople."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 静修者约瑟夫长老谈信仰的衰退
prophecies.a: 「末世时代，修道院将变得像世俗的旅馆。修士们将失去祈祷的热忱，追求舒适而非灵性修行。真正的信仰将只在少数人中保存。」
prophecies.q_en: Joseph the Hesychast on the decline of faith
prophecies.a_en: "In the end times, monasteries will become like secular hotels. Monks will lose their zeal for prayer, pursuing comfort rather than spiritual practice. True faith will be preserved only among a few."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 静修者约瑟夫长老谈未来的大战
prophecies.a: 「一场大战将会到来，世界上大部分人口将死亡。但之后会有和平——一种属灵的和平，上帝会以祂的方式使万物更新。」
prophecies.q_en: Joseph the Hesychast on a great future war
prophecies.a_en: "A great war will come, and most of the world's population will perish. But afterwards there will be peace — a spiritual peace, and God will renew all things in His own way."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 波菲里奥斯长老谈末世的征兆
prophecies.a: 「当你看到人们变得像野兽一样，不再有爱心，不再关心彼此——那就是末世的征兆。不是地震和战争，而是人心的荒芜才是真正的末日信号。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Porphyrios on signs of the end times
prophecies.a_en: "When you see people becoming like beasts, without love, without caring for one another — that is the sign of the end times. Not earthquakes and wars, but the desolation of human hearts is the true signal of the end."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 波菲里奥斯长老谈科技与人类灵魂
prophecies.a: 「科技将发展到人们可以看到世界上任何角落发生的事情。但这不会带来幸福。人们会变得更加孤独，因为他们用屏幕代替了真正的人际关系。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Porphyrios on technology and the human soul
prophecies.a_en: "Technology will advance to the point where people can see what is happening in any corner of the world. But this will not bring happiness. People will become more lonely, because they will replace real human relationships with screens."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 智能手机和社交媒体的普及使人们确实可以实时查看全球任何角落的事件。与此同时，多项社会学研究（如2023年美国卫生总监关于社交媒体与孤独感的报告）证实了科技时代的社交孤立问题日益严重。
prophecies.verdict_en: The proliferation of smartphones and social media has indeed enabled people to see events from any corner of the world in real time. Meanwhile, multiple sociological studies (such as the 2023 US Surgeon General's report on social media and loneliness) have confirmed the growing problem of social isolation in the technological age.
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈土耳其与俄罗斯的战争
prophecies.a: 「战争将从土耳其和俄罗斯之间开始。起初土耳其会以为自己能赢，但那将是它的毁灭。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on war between Turkey and Russia
prophecies.a_en: "The war will start between Russia and Turkey. At first Turkey will think it is winning, but that will be its destruction."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈君士坦丁堡的回归
prophecies.a: 「君士坦丁堡终将回到我们手中。三分之一的土耳其人将成为基督徒，三分之一将死去，三分之一将前往美索不达米亚。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on the return of Constantinople
prophecies.a_en: "Constantinople will be ours again. One third of the Turks will become Christians, one third will die, and one third will leave for Mesopotamia."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈六国联盟
prophecies.a: 「六个国家将联合攻打土耳其。它将被分成三四个部分。在这场大的动荡中，我们将收回君士坦丁堡——不是因为希腊自身的力量，而是因为上帝的安排。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on the six-nation alliance
prophecies.a_en: "Six nations will unite against Turkey. It will be divided into three or four parts. In this great upheaval, we will take back Constantinople — not by our own strength, but by God's providence."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈敌基督与身份标记
prophecies.a: 「将会有一种电子身份标记系统。他们会从一张智能卡开始，然后他们会说为什么不直接标记在身体上呢？那就是敌基督的印记——666。拒绝接受标记的人将被社会排斥。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on the Antichrist and identification marks
prophecies.a_en: "There will be an electronic identification system. They will start with a smart card, then they will say why not mark it directly on the body? That will be the mark of the Antichrist — 666. Those who refuse the mark will be excluded from society."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈欧洲联盟
prophecies.a: 「欧洲将变成一个庞大的国家，但不会持续太久。它将分裂，因为不同的民族无法真正团结。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on the European Union
prophecies.a_en: "Europe will become one big state, but it will not last long. It will break apart, because different nations cannot truly unite."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈苏联解体后的俄罗斯
prophecies.a: 「俄罗斯在经历了七十年的无神论之后，将重新站起来，成为一个伟大的基督教国家。它将在末世事件中扮演重要角色。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on Russia after the Soviet collapse
prophecies.a_en: "Russia, after seventy years of atheism, will rise again and become a great Christian nation. It will play an important role in the events of the end times."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 苏联于1991年解体后，俄罗斯东正教会确实经历了显著复兴，教堂大量重建，信众人数回升。普京执政期间，东正教被重新定位为国家认同的核心要素。但「伟大的基督教国家」的定义仍有争议，俄罗斯社会的世俗化趋势并未完全逆转。
prophecies.verdict_en: After the Soviet Union collapsed in 1991, the Russian Orthodox Church did experience a significant revival, with churches rebuilt and congregations growing. Under Putin, Orthodoxy was repositioned as a core element of national identity. However, the characterization as a 'great Christian nation' remains debatable, as secularization trends in Russian society have not fully reversed.
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈虚假的和平
prophecies.a: 「在大战之前，会有一段虚假的和平时期。人们会说和平来了，但那只是暴风雨前的平静。敌基督会利用这段和平时期来建立他的权力体系。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on false peace
prophecies.a_en: "Before the great war, there will be a period of false peace. People will say peace has come, but it will only be the calm before the storm. The Antichrist will use this period of peace to establish his system of power."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈信仰复兴
prophecies.a: 「在所有这些灾难之后，人们将转向上帝。教堂将再次被填满。那些经历了苦难的人将理解，没有上帝的生活是毫无意义的。一个伟大的灵性复兴将会到来。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on the revival of faith
prophecies.a_en: "After all these catastrophes, people will turn to God. Churches will be full again. Those who have suffered will understand that life without God is meaningless. A great spiritual revival will come."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西奥斯长老谈伊米亚危机
prophecies.a: 「土耳其人会在爱琴海制造事端，但那不是大战。真正的大事件还没有到来。这些只是开始。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios on the Imia crisis
prophecies.a_en: "The Turks will create incidents in the Aegean, but that will not be the great war. The real events have not yet come. These are only the beginning."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1996年1月，希腊和土耳其因伊米亚（Imia/Kardak）岛礁主权争端几乎爆发军事冲突，最终在美国调停下避免了战争。帕伊西奥斯预言了爱琴海的紧张局势，但所预言的后续「大事件」至今未发生。
prophecies.verdict_en: In January 1996, Greece and Turkey nearly came to armed conflict over the Imia/Kardak islets sovereignty dispute, ultimately defused through US mediation. Paisios correctly anticipated tensions in the Aegean, but the subsequent 'great events' he predicted have not yet materialized.
prophecies.yearReason: 阿陀斯山修士在预言传统中提及该时期
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks mentioned this period in their prophetic tradition

prophecies.q: 帕伊西长老：关于君士坦丁堡收复的预言
prophecies.a: 「君士坦丁堡终将回到基督徒手中。土耳其将在一场大战中被击败，城市将恢复其原名。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios: Prophecy about reclaiming Constantinople
prophecies.a_en: "Constantinople will eventually return to Christian hands. Turkey will be defeated in a great war, and the city will be restored to its original name."
prophecies.yearReason: 帕伊西长老关于君士坦丁堡的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Elder Paisios' prophecy about Constantinople has no specific date

prophecies.q: 帕伊西长老：关于土耳其分裂的预言
prophecies.a: 「土耳其将被分为三到四个部分。库尔德人将获得独立，亚美尼亚将扩大领土。这一切将在一场涉及俄罗斯的大战之后发生。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios: Prophecy about Turkey's partition
prophecies.a_en: "Turkey will be divided into three or four parts. The Kurds will gain independence, and Armenia will expand its territory. This will happen after a great war involving Russia."
prophecies.yearReason: 帕伊西长老关于土耳其的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Elder Paisios' prophecy about Turkey has no specific date

prophecies.q: 帕伊西长老：关于中东大战的预言
prophecies.a: 「中东将爆发一场大战。战争将从叙利亚开始，最终卷入许多国家。这场战争将导致土耳其的崩溃。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios: Prophecy about a great Middle East war
prophecies.a_en: "A great war will erupt in the Middle East. It will start from Syria and eventually involve many nations. This war will lead to the collapse of Turkey."
prophecies.yearReason: 帕伊西长老关于中东战争的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Elder Paisios' prophecy about a Middle East war has no specific date

prophecies.q: 帕伊西长老：关于欧洲伊斯兰化的预言
prophecies.a: 「欧洲将面临来自穆斯林移民的严重挑战。基督教文明将受到威胁，但最终将在苦难中复兴。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios: Prophecy about Islamization of Europe
prophecies.a_en: "Europe will face a serious challenge from Muslim immigration. Christian civilization will be threatened but will ultimately revive through suffering."
prophecies.yearReason: 帕伊西长老关于欧洲穆斯林移民的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Elder Paisios' prophecy about Muslim immigration in Europe has no specific date

prophecies.q: 帕伊西长老：关于身份证和控制的预言
prophecies.a: 「他们将给每个人一个数字。那些拒绝接受这个数字的人将无法买卖。这是敌基督者控制人类的方式。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios: Prophecy about ID numbers and control
prophecies.a_en: "They will give everyone a number. Those who refuse to accept this number will be unable to buy or sell. This is the Antichrist's way of controlling humanity."
prophecies.yearReason: 帕伊西长老关于数字身份控制的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Elder Paisios' prophecy about digital identity control has no specific date

prophecies.q: 阿托斯山长老们：关于末世信仰考验的预言
prophecies.a: 「在末后的日子里，真正的基督徒将像早期教会一样受到逼迫。修道院将被关闭，信徒将在暗中聚会。」
prophecies.q_en: Athos Elders: Prophecy about end-times faith trials
prophecies.a_en: "In the last days, true Christians will be persecuted as in the early Church. Monasteries will be closed, and believers will meet in secret."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿托斯山长老们关于末世迫害的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos elders' prophecy about end-times persecution has no specific date

prophecies.q: 帕伊西长老：关于希腊的预言
prophecies.a: 「希腊将经历巨大的经济困难和政治动荡，但最终将在精神上得到复兴。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios: Prophecy about Greece
prophecies.a_en: "Greece will experience great economic difficulties and political turmoil, but will ultimately experience spiritual revival."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2010年希腊爆发主权债务危机，经济濒临崩溃，GDP下降超过25%，失业率一度超过27%。国际货币基金组织和欧盟多次紧急救助。帕伊西长老关于希腊经济困难的预言部分应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: Greece's sovereign debt crisis erupted in 2010, with the economy near collapse — GDP dropped over 25% and unemployment exceeded 27%. The IMF and EU provided multiple emergency bailouts. Elder Paisios' prophecy about Greece's economic difficulties was partially fulfilled.
prophecies.yearReason: 帕伊西长老关于希腊经济困难的预言在2010年债务危机中应验
prophecies.yearReason_en: Elder Paisios' prophecy about Greek economic difficulties was fulfilled in the 2010 debt crisis

prophecies.q: 约瑟夫长老：关于精神荒芜的预言
prophecies.a: 「将来会有这样一个时代，人们虽然拥有一切物质财富，却感到内心极度空虚。他们将像饥饿的人一样寻求精神的滋养。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Joseph: Prophecy about spiritual desolation
prophecies.a_en: "There will come a time when people, though possessing every material wealth, will feel extreme inner emptiness. They will seek spiritual nourishment like the hungry."
prophecies.yearReason: 约瑟夫长老关于精神空虚的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Elder Joseph's prophecy about spiritual desolation has no specific date

prophecies.q: 帕伊西长老：关于俄土战争的预言
prophecies.a: 「俄罗斯将与土耳其开战。战争将非常短暂，俄罗斯将取得决定性胜利。这将导致君士坦丁堡的归还。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios: Prophecy about Russo-Turkish war
prophecies.a_en: "Russia will go to war with Turkey. The war will be very brief, and Russia will achieve a decisive victory. This will lead to the return of Constantinople."
prophecies.yearReason: 帕伊西长老关于俄土战争的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Elder Paisios' prophecy about a Russo-Turkish war has no specific date

prophecies.q: 帕伊西长老：关于经济体系崩溃的预言
prophecies.a: 「现代经济体系是建立在沙子上的。当纸币变得一文不值时，人们将重新认识到真正的财富是土地和劳动。」
prophecies.q_en: Elder Paisios: Prophecy about economic system collapse
prophecies.a_en: "The modern economic system is built on sand. When paper money becomes worthless, people will rediscover that true wealth is land and labor."
prophecies.yearReason: 帕伊西长老关于经济崩溃的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Elder Paisios' prophecy about economic collapse has no specific date

prophecies.q: 阿托斯山修士：关于圣像流泪的预兆
prophecies.a: 「在大灾难来临之前，世界各地的圣像将开始流泪。这是圣母对她孩子们的警告。」
prophecies.q_en: Athos Monks: Prophecy about weeping icons
prophecies.a_en: "Before the great catastrophe, icons around the world will begin to weep. This is the Virgin Mary's warning to her children."
prophecies.yearReason: 阿托斯山修士关于圣像流泪的预言无具体时间
prophecies.yearReason_en: Athos monks' prophecy about weeping icons has no specific date
